description_long: This bungalow features a single-story wooden structure with a prominent dark gabled roof and a wraparound porch area. The exterior walls are constructed from horizontal timber logs, giving it a rustic yet refined appearance. The front of the house includes a covered porch with steps leading up, and several large windows provide ample natural light. The property is set on a triangular plot, bordered by a wooden fence and landscaped with grass and stone pathways. Outdoor seating is visible on the porch, enhancing its residential and welcoming character. The overall design is compact, with a focus on comfort and integration with the surrounding yard.
description: A single-story wooden bungalow with a dark gabled roof, wraparound porch, and large windows, set on a triangular landscaped plot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and a clear view of the gabled roof and stone pathway.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the wraparound porch with outdoor seating and the extended roof overhang.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the boundary fence along the property edge.
description_view_3: Back corner view emphasizing the wooden fence, rear porch area, and the overall triangular plot layout.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and front windows
